title: austrogramme marginata
intro: Austrogramme marginata is a type of flowering plant native to tropical Africa, belonging to the family Celastraceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Austrogramme marginata include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat various skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Austrogramme marginata can be prepared as a herbal infusion or decoction, which can be used to treat various ailments, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and potential side effects.
